    G

    getAllMedicalStaff() - Method in class model.MapModel
    Returns all medical staff members registered in the system.
    getAnimProgress() - Method in class ui.MapCanvas
    Returns current animation progress (0.0 to 1.0).
    getAutonomy() - Method in class model.Drone
    Returns the maximum range of the drone in km.
    getAvailableDrones() - Method in class model.DroneBase
    Returns all drones in this base that are available for a mission.
    getAvailableOrganTypes() - Method in class model.CollectionCenter
     
    getAverageDistanceToUserPoints() - Method in class model.VoronoiCell
     
    getBatteryLevel() - Method in class model.Drone
    Returns the current battery level (0-100).
    getBatteryLevel() - Method in class model.Mission
    Returns the current battery level (0-100).
    getCapacity() - Method in class model.DroneBase
     
    getCellBySite(MedicalSite) - Method in class model.VoronoiDiagram
    Returns the Voronoi cell associated with a medical site.

    Computes the circumcenter of the triangle.

    Returns the medical staff member who created the request.

    Returns the current position of the drone during the mission.
